description_long: This armchair features a high, wingback design with a tall, straight backrest and gently curved sides, providing both support and a sense of enclosure. The upholstery is a textured blue-gray fabric, accented with a neat row of metallic nailhead trim outlining the armrests and base. The seat is wide and flat, with a firm, integrated cushion that blends seamlessly into the overall form. The armrests are straight and rise smoothly from the seat, following the contour of the backrest. The chair stands on four straight, tapered wooden legs with a dark brown finish, giving it a sturdy and elegant appearance. The overall style is modern with classic influences, suitable for upscale urban interiors or stylish public waiting areas.
description: A high-back, winged armchair upholstered in blue-gray fabric with nailhead trim and dark wooden legs. The design is modern yet classic, offering both comfort and visual sophistication.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the tall, straight backrest and the full height of the chair, with visible fabric texture and dark wooden legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the curved wingback profile, straight armrest, and nailhead trim along the edge.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide seat, integrated cushion, and symmetrical armrests with nailhead detailing.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, showing the continuous curve of the backrest and armrest, and the nailhead trim.
attribute_armrest_design: upholstered, straight, and integrated with nailhead trim
attribute_backrest_style: high and winged, straight with subtle side curves, fully upholstered
attribute_leg_type: straight, tapered wooden legs with dark finish
